mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.adjust_trial_type, t0.litigation_id, t0.project_id, t0.law_firm_id, t0.is_stock, t0.adjust_trial_date, t0.adjust_code, t0.compensatory_amount, t0.interest, t0.back_out_amount, t0.other_amount, t0.special_remarks, t0.remarks, t0.flow_state, t0.is_deleted
